example_packs.notes: Rational/real algebraic shadows of order, limits, and inequalities.

proof_routes.name: General completeness, limits, continuity, compactness, and convergence proofs need Lean reconstruction.

Concept rows still need generated dashboard coverage before field status can graduate.

rows.title: Set theory and foundations

example_packs.notes: Finite set, relation, function, and cardinality checks.

proof_routes.name: ZFC, ordinals, cardinals, choice, and infinite set facts are proof-horizon material.

rows.title: Statistics
rows.summary: Undergraduate / graduate applied math and data science. First Axeyum slice: Descriptive statistics, contingency tables, exact finite tests, small Bayesian tables
axeyum_fragments: Descriptive statistics, contingency tables, exact finite tests, small Bayesian tables

example_packs.notes: Mean/variance identities, contingency tables, exact tests, and Simpson witnesses.

rows.title: Topology
